name: Dashboard and Gate Workflow
scope_implemented: General dashboard with dark-theme HTML, navigation, and status badges (src/api/app.py)
Background Gate Runner UI: run single gate via POST /api/gates/{gate_id}/run, run all via /api/gates/run-all
GateResult rendering: failure reason + remediation steps + re-run button on /dashboard/gates/{gate_id}
Road to Live view (/dashboard/road-to-live, /api/gates/road-to-live) with live readiness score, blocking criteria, next actions
Audit logs panel (/dashboard/audit-logs, /api/audit-logs) with audit_log table, all dashboard actions logged
Reports panel (/dashboard/reports, /api/reports) listing completion + review reports from reports/
Remediation actions panel (/dashboard/remediation, /api/remediation) with complete endpoint
MON gate Phase 7 smoke test (src/gates/phase7.py) — TestClient-based panel validation
Phase 7 test suite: 46 new tests in tests/test_phase7_dashboard.py

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Aggregate and per-symbol stats with day/week/month/all-time/custom range; all metrics recompute per scope
acceptance_criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase7_dashboard.py::test_stats_all_periods (parametrized 7 periods), test_stats_custom_period, test_per_symbol_stats_scaffold, test_per_symbol_stats_with_period; src/api/stats.py resolve_window()

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Background Gate Runner UI: run single/group/all; live progress + logs; GateResult rendering with failure reason + remediation + re-run button
acceptance_criteria.evidence: POST /api/gates/{gate_id}/run enqueues job (test_gate_run_enqueues_job @requires_redis); /api/jobs/{job_id}/logs; gate detail page renders spec + remediation + run button (test_gate_detail_structure, test_gate_detail_page_renders)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Road to Live view shows every gate, blocking criteria, and next action; approvals + audit logs; reports linked
acceptance_criteria.evidence: test_road_to_live_structure, test_road_to_live_gate_fields (gate_id/name/phase/status/blocks_live/next_action/remediation_steps), test_approvals_list, test_audit_logs_list, test_reports_list, test_road_to_live_page_renders

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Gates PASS: dashboard renders all existing gate results correctly (smoke gate MON for panels)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: src/gates/phase7.py check_mon_dashboard_panels() — 10 criteria smoke-testing all Phase 7 panels via TestClient; all 232 tests pass; MON gate includes Phase 7 panels via src/gates/checks.py

gates.self_check_result: PASS (via TestClient smoke test embedded in gate check; 10/10 panel criteria pass)
gates.note: MON gate uses TestClient in gate runner context; full Redis-backed run requires `make -s run-gate GATE=MON FORMAT=json`

tests.ruff: All checks passed (ruff check src tests)
tests.mypy: Success: no issues found in 93 source files

assumptions_and_decisions: Trading-level metrics (PnL, drawdown, win_rate, etc.) scaffolded as zeros for Phase 8 — schema is complete, data is not yet available until paper trading is active
HTML dashboard uses inline CSS dark-theme strings — E501 lint suppressed for src/api/app.py via pyproject.toml per-file-ignores; this is intentional per Appendix B
MON gate Phase 7 panel checks use FastAPI TestClient (no real HTTP server) — valid gate check pattern matching how test_api.py works
Custom time period URL-encoding: '+' in ISO timestamps is URL-decoded as space; fixed with ts.replace(' ', '+') in stats.py resolve_window()
known_gaps: Trading stats (PnL, drawdown, win_rate) return zeros until Phase 8 paper trading populates DB
Gate run-all endpoint enqueues jobs serially; parallel execution deferred to Phase 8+ infrastructure improvements
MON gate full Redis-backed run requires Redis to be running; test_mon_gate_passes_with_phase7_panels is @requires_redis decorated
tested: yes — 232/232 tests pass; ruff + mypy clean; MON panel smoke test embedded in gate checks
